title: Wrong Images and Broken Close Button Caused Rework

mitigations.title: Use food photos, not random images
mitigations.action: Use curated, content-relevant image URLs instead of random placeholder services that show unrelated pictures.
mitigations.rationale:
Random placeholders showed landscapes instead of food.
- Users judge recipe sites by food imagery
- Curated images match the actual content

mitigations.title: Test buttons before showing the site
mitigations.action: After adding interactive elements like modals and buttons, click each one to verify it works before presenting to the user.
mitigations.rationale:
The close button looked correct but did nothing.
- A quick click test catches missing connections
- Prevents users from getting stuck

mitigations.title: Check the site works before previewing
mitigations.action: Before showing a preview, run quick checks: click all buttons, test search, and verify images load correctly.
mitigations.rationale:
Both image and button issues reached the user.
- Quick checks catch obvious failures early
- Prevents wasted review rounds

friction_types.description: You wanted food images for each recipe but the agent used a random image service that showed landscapes and objects instead.
The recipe detail popup had a close button that did nothing, leaving you stuck in the popup with no way to go back.
You wanted to start building right away but the agent spent a long time exploring and planning before you interrupted it.
